Common.promiseShort: Best possible quality after the platform compresses it.
Common.promiseLong: Every platform re-compresses what you upload — we can't stop that. VideoNest prepares your video so the platform's own compression does the least possible damage, keeping it as sharp as possible.
Common.privacy: 100% on your device — your video never leaves it.

Home.choosePlatformSub: Pick where you're posting — each format is tuned to its own specs.

Tool.dropPrompt: Drop your video in and we'll make it look its best after you post.
Tool.statsNote: We prepare your video so the platform's own compression does the least damage.

Editor.sharpenHint: Optional — can add artifacts after the platform recompresses.
Editor.normalizeHint: Off by default — most platforms normalize loudness themselves.
Editor.optional: Editing is optional — skip it and we just optimize.

Share.mobile: Tap Share, then post the saved video from the app.
Share.desktop: Download it, then post from the mobile app (the web uploader compresses harder).
Share.whatsappHd: Tip: turn on WhatsApp's HD upload (Settings → Storage and data → Media quality).
